description_long: This object is a large, rectangular block made from polished white marble with subtle gray veining throughout its surface. The block has crisp, sharply defined edges and a smooth, glossy finish, giving it a refined and modern appearance. Its surfaces are unbroken and free from any visible chips, cracks, or engravings, suggesting it is well-maintained or newly fabricated. The marble's natural veining patterns are visible on all sides, adding a touch of elegance and visual interest. The block is solid and heavy, likely intended as a barrier or decorative element in an urban environment. Its uniform geometry and high-quality finish make it suitable for use in upscale public spaces, plazas, or as a protective obstacle in pedestrian areas.
description: A large, polished white marble block with subtle gray veining and a smooth, glossy finish. It has sharp edges and a solid, refined appearance.
description_view_0: The front face shows a broad, uninterrupted expanse of polished marble with visible gray veining.
description_view_1: This side view is nearly identical to the front, displaying the same smooth marble surface and subtle veining.
description_view_2: The block's opposite face mirrors the other sides, with consistent veining and a glossy finish.
description_view_3: This view again shows the same polished marble surface, with the veining pattern slightly shifted but otherwise uniform.
attribute_location_context: modern urban plaza or upscale sidewalk barrier
attribute_installation_method: set in concrete or on a leveled foundation
attribute_weathering_pattern: No visible weathering; the surface appears clean and well-maintained with no signs of erosion or discoloration.
